name: Ribbed Tray Blue - Room Essentials™
description:
Add textural charm and a bit of style to your bath space or vanity with the Ribbed Tray from Room Essentials™. This blue tray is designed in a rectangle shape with raised sides to give you ample space for displaying your makeup brushes, cosmetics and other essentials. Showcasing a ribbed design allover, this rectangle tray should be hand washed for easy cleanup.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
